description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsBrown wallet with a multi colour design on the front that has a zipped compartment, an insert pocket with four card holders, zipped pocket at the back, stitch detailing and brand name on a metallic badge with a keyhole design on the frontMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions:12 cm x 22 cm
